texto: O America, I am your Liberty, and you are that huddled mass yearning to breathe free. I am your Lighthouse, the One beaconing [yea, beckoning], and you are that wayfarer—strayed, grayed, and frayed … Now, return, you tempest-tost; lift up your gaze to the lighted torch aloft the golden door and come home.
explicacao: Citação de Maurice Suwa sobre temas ligados a fe. “O America, I am your Liberty, and you are that huddled mass yearning to breathe free. I am your L…” articula fe, america, god em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como god e letter.
